changes.old: The tactic adopted by the Cousin of steering our dinghy northward
changes.new: The tactic adopted by Gousin of steering our dinghy northward
changes.reason: Restores the proper name Gousin (both Claude and Gemini drafts); the synthesis misread the surname governed by dal as the common noun cousin.
changes.context_sentence: igantic before my eyes.  The tactic adopted by Gousin of steering our dinghy northward had produced its effect.
